3.solution:
For same even total 2n: n(1/18+1/x)=1 â†’ x=18n/(18âˆ’n). Integer x for n=1..17:
n=6â†’x=9, n=9â†’x=18, n=12â†’x=36, n=14â†’x=63, n=15â†’x=90, n=16â†’x=144, n=17â†’x=306.
For same odd total: only x=18 (already included). Total 7 values.
Answer: 7.

5.solution:
A=3, B=9, C=27, D=81, E=243 days. Let A do a units/day: a/3+a/9+a/27+a/81=40a/81.
aâˆ’40a/81=41a/81=287 â†’ a=567 units/day.
C's rate=a/9=63. E's rate=a/81=7. Câˆ’E=63âˆ’7=56.
Answer: 56.

9.solution:
Day n: 2^(nâˆ’1) workers each at 2^(nâˆ’1) efficiency â†’ day-n output = 4^(nâˆ’1) units.
Total after n days = (4^nâˆ’1)/3. Need = 5461 (total work).
(4^nâˆ’1)/3 â‰¥ 5461 â†’ 4^n â‰¥ 16384 = 4^7. n=7 gives (16383)/3=5461. âœ“
Answer: C (7).

10.solution:
Amar=3Ă—(Akbar+Anthony together): 3/a=1/b+1/c. Akbar=2Ă—(Amar+Anthony together): 2/b=1/a+1/c.
Substitute 1/b=3/aâˆ’1/c: 2(3/aâˆ’1/c)=1/a+1/c â†’ 5/a=3/c â†’ a=5Ă—21/3=35. 1/b=3/35âˆ’1/21=4/105.
Amar+Akbar: 1/35+4/105=7/105=1/15. For 2Ă— work: 2Ă—15=30 days.
Answer: C (30).
